title: Slovakian Pancakes with Crispy Onion
description: A crispy Slovakian pancake dish loaded with caramelized onions for a delicious breakfast treat.

ingredients.name: Crumbly
ingredients.notes: crumbly cheese (e.g. feta or goat cheese)

instructions: Caramelize the onion in a pan over medium heat for 20 minutes.
Cook the Slovakian pancakes according to the package instructions.
Crumble the crumbly cheese and set aside.
Assemble the dish by placing a cooked pancake on a serving plate, topping with caramelized onion, and sprinkling crumbly cheese.
